reason: tests verify behavior via text matching, not runtime execution. Both nop=1 and gold=1 regardless of instruction content because P2P tests (clang-format, cpplint, header guards, file existence, git state) pass unconditionally and F2P tests fail on the base commit's file state which already contains the string 'requesting_frame->GetLastCommittedOrigin().GetURL()' that the gold patch is supposed to introduce. The test oracle cannot distinguish correct from incorrect solutions.
